Section 53 Autonomy Gradient Surface

Autonomy controls bind execution posture by task, workspace, repo, user, and policy tier.

Suggest Only

Produces advice only and never mutates workspace state.

  • Execute: NO
  • Mutate: NO
  • Background: NO
  • Review gates: none

Draft and Wait

Produces a patch plan and diff but stops before execution.

  • Execute: NO
  • Mutate: NO
  • Background: NO
  • Review gates: draft-ready

Execute with Review Gates

May execute, but only after an explicit review gate is satisfied.

  • Execute: YES
  • Mutate: YES
  • Background: NO
  • Review gates: pre-execution-human-approval

Full Autonomous

Completes the approved task without pausing for human review.

  • Execute: YES
  • Mutate: YES
  • Background: NO
  • Review gates: none

Continuous Maintenance Mode

Enables unattended maintenance scheduling in addition to direct execution.

  • Execute: YES
  • Mutate: YES
  • Background: YES
  • Review gates: none

Execution runs

RequestedEffectiveState mutatedPausedSchedulerStop reason
suggest-onlysuggest-onlyNONONOsuggestion_only
draft-and-waitdraft-and-waitNONONOdraft_ready_waiting
execute-with-review-gatesexecute-with-review-gatesNOYESNOawaiting_human_approval
execute-with-review-gatesexecute-with-review-gatesYESNONOcompleted
full-autonomousfull-autonomousYESNONOcompleted
continuous-maintenance-modecontinuous-maintenance-modeYESNOYESmaintenance_active
full-autonomousexecute-with-review-gatesNONONOforbidden_autonomy_escalation
